citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 12:05pm on April 3,
2026. On arrival spoke with receptionist who attempted to contact licensee but no answer since licensee was out for the
Easter holiday. No one else available for an inspection. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for
inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in
enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 12:05pm on April 3, 
2026. On arrival spoke with receptionist who attempted to contact licensee but no answer since licensee was out for the 
Easter holiday. No one else available for an inspection. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for 
inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in 
enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
